sources.name: BetaList
sources.notes: Requires sign-in (X/Twitter or email magic link) to access submission form. Cannot automate — needs human to create account, fill product details, and submit screenshots. Free submission available once logged in.

sources.name: SaaSHub
sources.notes: Requires account creation (Google/email) and Cloudflare-protected submit page. API is read-only. Needs human to create account, fill submission form with product name/description/categories/competitors, wait 1-3 days approval.

sources.name: AlternativeTo
sources.notes: Requires account creation with 1-week waiting period before submitting 'Suggest new application'. Needs human to register, fill platform/license/description/tags, then approve.

sources.name: Crunchbase
sources.notes: Requires account registration (email/password or Google/LinkedIn) with social authentication before creating a company profile. Needs human to create account, fill company details, and save.

sources.name: G2
sources.priority: High — DR 86, shows up in 'cron monitoring' searches
sources.notes: Requires account creation to add listing. Free profile available but needs human to create account, fill software profile, and request reviews.

sources.name: Capterra
sources.notes: Same parent company as G2. Requires account creation. Paid listing model. Needs human to complete process.

sources.name: GetApp
sources.notes: Same parent company as G2. Requires account creation. Needs human to complete profile and listing setup.

sources.name: Uneed
sources.priority: High — DR 75, very easy submit product URL, dofollow backlink
sources.notes: Submit page automatically scrapes product URL but requires account sign-up to complete and launch. 'No account needed to preview' but must create account to finalize. MCP/REST API at mcp.uneed.best is read-only — no write/submit endpoints.

sources.name: DevHunt
sources.notes: Requires GitHub account sign-in to submit dev tool. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: LibHunt
sources.notes: Requires account creation to add OSS project. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Peerlist
sources.notes: Requires account creation and profile setup. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Fazier
sources.notes: Requires account creation to submit product. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: OpenSourceAlternative
sources.notes: Requires account creation to submit OSS project. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Launching Next
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: MicroLaunch
sources.priority: Medium — DR 50, very easy short form
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Indie Hackers
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Writing a story post for backlink needs human author.

sources.name: Failory
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Startup Stash
sources.notes: Curated directory, requires account and editorial review. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Startup88
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: eResilience
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: StartupBase
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Starthub
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: PitchGround
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Smol Launch
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Open Source Software Directory
sources.notes: Requires account creation or Google Sheets form submission. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Geekflare
sources.notes: Requires account creation for tool submission. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: Postmake
sources.notes: Requires account creation. Needs human interaction.

sources.name: awesome-laravel (PR #662 follow-up)
sources.notes: PR #662 by HarunRRayhan to add Crontinel under Monitoring section. Open since April 21, 2026. Mergerable, no comments from maintainer. Bumped with a comment on 2026-07-19. Awaiting maintainer review/merge.

sources.name: awesome-selfhosted (PR needed)
sources.notes: Crontinel first released April 6, 2026 (~3.5 months ago). Awesome-selfhosted requires 'first released more than 4 months ago'. Will qualify around mid-August 2026. Revisit then with a YAML PR under software/crontinel.yml using Automation tag.

sources.name: OSS Directory
sources.notes: Uses Unicorn Platform builder. Submission requires filling complex web form or contributing to Google Sheets database. Needs human interaction. Low DR value (38).

sources.name: Product Hunt
sources.priority: High — DR 92, scheduled for launch day
sources.notes: Requires human to schedule and manage launch. Not suitable for automation. Schedule for designated launch day with prepared assets (screenshots, tagline, description).
